title: PREVENTING HLB EPIDEMICS FOR ENSURING CITRUS SURVIVAL IN EUROPE
subtitle: SFS-05-2018 New and emerging risks to plant health
description: A project outline for PRE-HLB aiming to safeguard European citrus production from Huanglongbing (HLB) by implementing preventive actions, surveillance, and research-based control strategies. It details the project's objectives, consortium partners, and planned measures to reduce disease impact and develop long-term resistant varieties.
